chart_weight_params.note: Weighted root polynomial. Weights are normalized to mean 1 before fitting. Only ColorChecker patches are weighted; target glue standards are not used for fitting.

correction_control.note: correction_strength=1 means full correction; 0 means original image; alpha_sweep is evaluated in Lab space from before_lab to full_after_lab.

target_colors.sampling_method: glue block mask + highlight/shadow filtering + trimmed mean
